FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface ITextItemizer

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.dll

Text itemization seam (text.md §4.4): segment a string into BiDi × script runs and compute per-position line-break opportunities (UAX #14). The DirectWrite leaf implements it over IDWriteTextAnalyzer + the callee IDWriteTextAnalysisSource/Sink CCWs; a portable Unicode itemizer is the cross-platform follow-up. The shaper (and, later, the layout engine's wrap) consume this output so measure and render segment identically.

public interface ITextItemizer

Methods

Itemize(ReadOnlySpan<char>, List<ItemRun>, List<BreakOpp>)

Itemize text into runs (BiDi × script segmentation, logical order) and breaks (one entry per UTF-16 unit). Both lists are cleared and refilled.

void Itemize(ReadOnlySpan<char> text, List<ItemRun> runs, List<BreakOpp> breaks)

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>
runs List<ItemRun>
breaks List<BreakOpp>
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
